description.ko: 기하학적 유리를 통해 백색광이 찬란한 무지개 빛깔의 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 정교한 물리적 순간을 시각적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of optical physics, capturing the precise moment white light splits into a vibrant color spectrum through geometric glass.

prompt: Macro photography of a high-clarity triangular crystal prism placed on a dark reflective surface, a single sharp beam of white light entering and dispersing into a brilliant, detailed rainbow spectrum, visible caustic light patterns, sharp focus on the refraction point, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic texture.
